'''hajozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycosanoate|mycosanoate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycosanoate|mycosanoate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hajozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjezheth|hæjezheth]] || [[word:hæjezhej|hæjezhej]] || [[word:hæjezhesh|hæjezhesh]] || [[word:hæjezhe|hæjezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajojozhoth|hajojozhoth]] || [[word:hajojozhoj|hajojozhoj]] || [[word:hajojozhosh|hajojozhosh]] || [[word:hajojozho|hajojozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajozhoth|hajozhoth]] || [[word:hajozhoj|hajozhoj]] || [[word:hajozhosh|hajozhosh]] || [[word:hajozho|hajozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajofzhoth|hajofzhoth]] || [[word:hajofzhoj|hajofzhoj]] || [[word:hajofzhosh|hajofzhosh]] || [[word:hajofzhof|hajofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajozhotho|hajozhotho]] || [[word:hajozhojo|hajozhojo]] || [[word:hajozhosho|hajozhosho]] || [[word:hajozhoko|hajozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajozhoth|hajozhoth]] || [[word:hajozhoj|hajozhoj]] || [[word:hajozhosh|hajozhosh]] || [[word:hajozho|hajozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajozhothol|hajozhothol]] || [[word:hajozhojol|hajozhojol]] || [[word:hajozhoshol|hajozhoshol]] || [[word:hajozhokol|hajozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajozhothotho|hajozhothotho]] || [[word:hajozhojojo|hajozhojojo]] || [[word:hajozhoshosho|hajozhoshosho]] || [[word:hajozhoko|hajozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajozhothon|hajozhothon]] || [[word:hajozhojon|hajozhojon]] || [[word:hajozhoshon|hajozhoshon]] || [[word:hajozhokon|hajozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajozhothoro|hajozhothoro]] || [[word:hajozhojoro|hajozhojoro]] || [[word:hajozhoshoro|hajozhoshoro]] || [[word:hajozhokoro|hajozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
